name: Crock-Pot Chicken Cacciatore
recipeIngredient: 1 celery stalk with leaves, cut into 1-inch pieces
1/2 cup Chianti wine or any preferred wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced onion at the bottom of the crock-pot.
2. Add the chicken pieces (or a whole chicken) to the pot.
3. Stir together the tomato paste (6 oz.), garlic tomato paste, Creole seasoning, pepper, garlic, herbs, and wine in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Pour the remaining wine over the chicken as well.
6. Cover and cook on LOW for 7 to 9 hours, or HIGH for 3 to 4 hours.
7. Serve the chicken hot over spaghetti, vermicelli, fettuccini, or other pasta.
